# ModelPreferences.Hints property

OPTIONAL. Hints to guide model selection, evaluated in order with the first match taken (spec §21.2.9). The client SHOULD prioritize hints over the numeric priorities.

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<ModelHint>? Hints { get; set; }
```
